## Type of change

- [ ] New skill
- [ ] New command / rule / MCP config
- [ ] Update to existing skill or command
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Affected files

<!-- List the skill / command / rule files changed -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Skill has `name:` and `description:` frontmatter with at least 3 trigger keywords
- [ ] Code examples are TypeScript, strict, copy-pasteable (no placeholders)
- [ ] `Related Skills` section cross-references complementary skills
- [ ] `Validation` section has post-implementation checks
- [ ] README updated with new skill/command entry and correct count
- [ ] `docs/CATALOG.md` updated with trigger phrases
- [ ] `npm run check:skills` passes locally
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or real credentials in any file
